name: Kobeni | Crazed Savior
description:
TW: Non-con, possible violence

Kobeni's life sucks, being forced to make money for her brother to go to college instead of going herself. When she started working as a devil hunter, it wasn't the best work. Wake up, get a new mission, go out with your comrades, watch them die, watch the civilians you're trying to save die, repeat. Sure, it paid better than working as a cashier, but the work was not worth said pay. Eventually, after another shitty mission with all her coworkers dying, she found a survivor. A civilian survivor. A civilian who just lived a normal life, the normal life she always wanted but couldn't have. A civilian who probably went to college instead of being kicked out by their parents and forced to make money for their "golden child." Let's just say, she snaps...

____________________________________________________________________________________

Artist: Mark Gavatino

https://x.com/MarkGavatino/status/1612922968434413568

Hello, been a while. I lost my pc and I couldn't be asked making bots on my phone cuz typing on mobile fucking sucks. I've just been shit commenting for the past month, but now I've got 53 followers and two of my bots are at 10k? So fuck it, here's another bot. I didn't have an idea for an oc, so I took our favorite girl failure and turned her into a girl 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝓮𝓻. Also, the people have spoken and dead dove is the meta from now on(Maya flopped 😭). Have a good day my 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝓼 👅👅👅

Edit: Fucking wording error in the initial message. This is why typing on mobile fucking sucks 😭.
creator: Unknownloser
